title: Immediate Food Delivery II
input_format: Table: Delivery with columns delivery_id (int), customer_id (int), order_date (date), customer_pref_delivery_date (date)
output_format: Result table with column immediate_percentage showing the percentage of first orders that are immediate (rounded to 2 decimal places)
constraints:
- delivery_id is the primary key
- An order is immediate if order_date = customer_pref_delivery_date
- The first order is the order with the earliest order_date per customer
